svg.text: AddProfessorSubagent — skill workflow & live add pipeline
Subagent prompt → /skills/add-professor-from-url/SKILL.md → one execute() call → add_professor_from_url.py crawl + OCR + structured extract.
• Accept only official BIT CSAT detail URLs.
• Use execute exactly once to run the skill-owned script. • Do not rebuild professors.md.
• Return one compact final line: { status, professor_name, slug, markdown_path, page_count }.
